title: Supercharge Your Content with claude-blog: AI-Powered Writing & SEO for Developers!
contentMarkdown:
## 📝 Quick Summary: 
The claude-blog repository provides a comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools for writing, optimizing, and auditing blog content. It aims to produce high-quality articles that are dual-optimized for search engine rankings and AI citation platforms, ensuring content meets specific quality standards through a multi-stage delivery contract.

## 🔑 Key Takeaways

- ✅ claude-blog is a full-lifecycle AI blog engine built as a skill suite for Claude Code.

- ✅ Content is dual-optimized for Google SEO (E-E-A-T) and AI citation platforms like ChatGPT and Perplexity.

- ✅ A 5-gate Delivery Contract ensures every draft scores 90+ on a 100-point rubric, with automated iteration.

- ✅ Designed for production-grade content output, suitable for solo bloggers, marketing teams, and agencies.

- ✅ Automates content creation, optimization, and auditing at scale, freeing up developer time.


## 📊 Project Statistics
- ⭐ Stars: 904
- 🍴 Forks: 186
- ❗ Open Issues: 2


## 🛠 Tech Stack
- ✅ Python


This project is a comprehensive skill suite designed for Claude Code, functioning as your personal AI content factory. It's packed with 30 specialized sub-skills, managed by 5 intelligent agents, and leverages 12 distinct content templates to ensure variety and high quality in its output. Furthermore, it boasts 21 on-demand references, allowing it to pull accurate and deep information for its writing tasks. The core innovation, however, lies in its rigorous 5-gate Delivery Contract. This contract acts as an automated, super-strict editor, meticulously scoring every draft against a 100-point rubric. Should a draft fall below a 90-point threshold, claude-blog doesn't just give up; it automatically iterates and refines the content up to three times. This iterative process ensures that only top-tier, polished content ever reaches your review stage, saving significant time and effort.

claude-blog is specifically engineered for serious content creators, whether you're a solo blogger, part of a marketing team, or running an agency, who demand production-grade output rather than mere one-shot drafts. A key differentiator is its dual-optimization strategy. Every article it generates is meticulously crafted to rank high on Google, adhering to the latest ranking factors like the December 2025 Core Update and the critical E-E-A-T principles. Simultaneously, it's optimized for seamless citation by AI platforms such as ChatGPT and Perplexity, making your content discoverable and valuable across both human and artificial intelligence landscapes. The project's commitment to "eating its own dogfood" is a testament to its effectiveness; it uses itself to generate its own promotional and informational content, showcasing its capabilities in a very practical way. For developers, integrating this project means you can establish a robust, thoroughly tested, and high-performing content generation system directly into your existing workflows. This frees up invaluable development time, allowing you to focus on core coding tasks while ensuring a consistent stream of high-quality, SEO-optimized articles for your projects or clients. Imagine the efficiency of having blog posts meticulously crafted, refined, and ready for publication without constant manual oversight or the need for extensive content expertise. It represents a significant leap in automating the entire content lifecycle, from initial draft to publication-ready material.

## 📚 Learn More
[View the Project on GitHub](https://github.com/AgriciDaniel/claude-blog)
